detectors.description:
Reentrancy in FTX._transfer(address,address,uint256) (FTX.sol#653-777):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (FTX.sol#717)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (FTX.sol#791-803)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (FTX.sol#723)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5)) (FTX.sol#811)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5)) (FTX.sol#813)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (FTX.sol#775)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (FTX.sol#939)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (FTX.sol#919)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (FTX.sol#921)
	FTX._rOwned (FTX.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FTX._takeTeam(uint256) (FTX.sol#933-941)
	- FTX._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (FTX.sol#893-929)
	- FTX.balanceOf(address) (FTX.sol#479-483)
	- FTX.constructor() (FTX.sol#413-443)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (FTX.sol#775)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (FTX.sol#947)
	FTX._rTotal (FTX.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FTX._getCurrentSupply() (FTX.sol#1089-1099)
	- FTX._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (FTX.sol#945-951)
	- FTX.constructor() (FTX.sol#413-443)
	- FTX.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (FTX.sol#575-597)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [FTX._transfer(address,address,uint256)](FTX.sol#L653-L777):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](FTX.sol#L717)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](FTX.sol#L791-L803)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](FTX.sol#L723)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5))](FTX.sol#L811)
		- [_developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5))](FTX.sol#L813)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](FTX.sol#L775)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](FTX.sol#L939)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](FTX.sol#L919)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](FTX.sol#L921)
	[FTX._rOwned](FTX.sol#L331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [FTX._takeTeam(uint256)](FTX.sol#L933-L941)
	- [FTX._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](FTX.sol#L893-L929)
	- [FTX.balanceOf(address)](FTX.sol#L479-L483)
	- [FTX.constructor()](FTX.sol#L413-L443)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](FTX.sol#L775)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](FTX.sol#L947)
	[FTX._rTotal](FTX.sol#L343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [FTX._getCurrentSupply()](FTX.sol#L1089-L1099)
	- [FTX._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](FTX.sol#L945-L951)
	- [FTX.constructor()](FTX.sol#L413-L443)
	- [FTX.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](FTX.sol#L575-L597)
